title: Using ChatGPT, generate a historical overview of the Charity Organization
question_text: Using ChatGPT, generate a historical overview of the Charity Organization Society (1869) movement in England, and analyse how it laid the groundwork for what later became known as community organization practice.

title: A timeline excerpt (attached) traces community organization's emergence in the
question_text: A timeline excerpt (attached) traces community organization's emergence in the USA (1920s-1940s). Using ChatGPT, analyse the factors (urbanization, immigration, Great Depression) that drove community organization's rise as a distinct method during this period.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the historical development of community organization practice
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the historical development of community organization practice in India, from pre-independence rural reconstruction movements to post-1950s Community Development Programme initiatives.

title: A case profile (attached) describes an early Indian rural reconstruction
question_text: A case profile (attached) describes an early Indian rural reconstruction initiative (Sriniketan, 1920s). Using ChatGPT, analyse how this initiative reflects early community organization principles, even though the term was not yet formally used in India.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the influence of the Settlement House Movement
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the influence of the Settlement House Movement (Toynbee Hall, Hull House) on the later formalization of community organization as a social work method.

title: A comparison brief (attached) outlines India's Community Development Programme (1952)
question_text: A comparison brief (attached) outlines India's Community Development Programme (1952) launch context. Using ChatGPT, analyse why this programme is considered a landmark in Indian community organization history, and examine 2 of its stated limitations.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the Lane Report (1939) and its significance
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the Lane Report (1939) and its significance in formally recognizing community organization as a legitimate social work method in the USA.

title: A profile (attached) of the Panchayati Raj system's introduction (1959)
question_text: A profile (attached) of the Panchayati Raj system's introduction (1959) is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse the relationship between decentralized local governance and community organization practice in India.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the Great Depression-era need for coordinated
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the Great Depression-era need for coordinated community relief efforts in the USA shaped the professionalization of community organization practice.

title: A historical case summary (attached) describes Mahatma Gandhi's constructive programme
question_text: A historical case summary (attached) describes Mahatma Gandhi's constructive programme and village self-reliance initiatives. Using ChatGPT, analyse how these initiatives reflect early Indian community organization thinking, distinct from Western models.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the shift in community organization practice focus
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the shift in community organization practice focus from post-WWII physical reconstruction efforts to later social welfare planning coordination in Western countries.

title: A brief (attached) on the National Extension Service (India, 1953)
question_text: A brief (attached) on the National Extension Service (India, 1953) is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse its role in institutionalizing community organization approaches within Indian rural development policy.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the Councils of Social Agencies model
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the Councils of Social Agencies model in early 20th century America contributed to the coordination function central to community organization practice.

title: A comparative note (attached) contrasts India's and China's rural community
question_text: A comparative note (attached) contrasts India's and China's rural community development approaches post-1950. Using ChatGPT, analyse the differing ideological foundations shaping each country's community organization trajectory.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse how globalization and NGO-ization since the 1990s
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse how globalization and NGO-ization since the 1990s have reshaped community organization practice in India compared to its government-led origins.

title: Using ChatGPT, generate 3 different scholarly definitions of community organization
question_text: Using ChatGPT, generate 3 different scholarly definitions of community organization, and analyse the common themes and key differences among them.

title: A community profile (attached) describes a neighbourhood with fragmented civic
question_text: A community profile (attached) describes a neighbourhood with fragmented civic participation. Using ChatGPT, analyse which core aims of community organization (e.g., self-help capacity, democratic participation) are most relevant to addressing this community's situation.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the distinction between community organization as a
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the distinction between community organization as a 'method' of social work versus community organization as a 'field' of practice.

title: An objectives list (attached) from a local NGO's community organization
question_text: An objectives list (attached) from a local NGO's community organization project is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse whether these stated objectives align with the core nature and aims of community organization as a professional method.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the characteristic of community organization as a
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the characteristic of community organization as a 'process' rather than a one-time 'event,' and examine why this distinction matters for practitioners.

title: A field report excerpt (attached) describes a community project completed
question_text: A field report excerpt (attached) describes a community project completed within 2 months with no follow-up plan. Using ChatGPT, analyse whether this project reflects the core nature of community organization as an ongoing, capacity-building process.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the objective of 'developing leadership within
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the objective of 'developing leadership within the community' distinguishes community organization from top-down welfare delivery approaches.

title: A community leadership roster (attached) shows leadership concentrated in 2
question_text: A community leadership roster (attached) shows leadership concentrated in 2 families over 15 years. Using ChatGPT, analyse whether this pattern reflects successful community organization leadership development or a failure of this objective.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the aim of 'resource mobilization' in community
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the aim of 'resource mobilization' in community organization, distinguishing between mobilizing internal community resources versus external resources.

title: A resource inventory (attached) for a target community is provided
question_text: A resource inventory (attached) for a target community is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse which internal versus external resources this community could mobilize as part of a community organization initiative.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the objective of 'social integration' in community
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the objective of 'social integration' in community organization practice, and examine how it applies differently in ethnically diverse versus homogeneous communities.

title: A demographic profile (attached) of a religiously and linguistically mixed
question_text: A demographic profile (attached) of a religiously and linguistically mixed neighbourhood is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse the specific social integration challenges a community organizer would need to address here.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the objective of achieving 'balance between needs
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the objective of achieving 'balance between needs and resources' in community organization, and examine why this balance is often difficult to achieve in low-income communities.

title: A needs-versus-resources data table (attached) for a target community is
question_text: A needs-versus-resources data table (attached) for a target community is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse the specific gaps between needs and available resources shown in this data.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the aims and objectives of community
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse how the aims and objectives of community organization have evolved from purely welfare-coordination (early 20th century) to empowerment-and-advocacy-oriented (present day).

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'community self-determination' and examine
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'community self-determination' and examine a scenario where an external agency's priorities conflict with a community's own stated priorities (scenario attached).

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'participation' in community organization
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'participation' in community organization, and examine the difference between token participation and genuine participatory engagement.

title: A meeting attendance log (attached) shows the same 8 residents
question_text: A meeting attendance log (attached) shows the same 8 residents attending all community meetings out of a population of 400 households. Using ChatGPT, analyse whether this reflects the principle of participation being genuinely upheld.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'felt needs' in community
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'felt needs' in community organization, and examine why organizers are cautioned against imposing externally-identified needs onto a community.

title: A case scenario (attached) shows an NGO prioritizing a sanitation
question_text: A case scenario (attached) shows an NGO prioritizing a sanitation project while residents repeatedly express greater concern about unemployment. Using ChatGPT, analyse this mismatch through the lens of the 'felt needs' principle.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'cultural sensitivity' in community
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'cultural sensitivity' in community organization, and examine why disregarding local customs can undermine an otherwise well-designed intervention.

title: A field incident report (attached) describes a community meeting scheduled
question_text: A field incident report (attached) describes a community meeting scheduled during a major local festival, resulting in poor attendance. Using ChatGPT, analyse this incident in light of the cultural sensitivity principle.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'evaluation as continuous process'
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'evaluation as continuous process' in community organization, and examine why one-time end-of-project evaluation is considered insufficient.

title: A project monitoring plan (attached) shows evaluation scheduled only at
question_text: A project monitoring plan (attached) shows evaluation scheduled only at project completion (month 24). Using ChatGPT, analyse the risks of this evaluation design against the principle of continuous evaluation.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the scope of community organization across urban
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the scope of community organization across urban and rural settings, examining 2 key differences in how the method is typically applied in each.

title: A comparative profile (attached) contrasts an urban slum community organization
question_text: A comparative profile (attached) contrasts an urban slum community organization project with a rural village project. Using ChatGPT, analyse the differing scope and approach each context required.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the scope of community organization in disaster-affected
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the scope of community organization in disaster-affected settings, examining how core principles (participation, felt needs) must be adapted under crisis time constraints.

title: A post-disaster community assessment (attached) is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse
question_text: A post-disaster community assessment (attached) is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse how community organization principles could be applied within this disaster-recovery context despite time pressure.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'democratic functioning' in community
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the principle of 'democratic functioning' in community organization, examining how decision-making structures should reflect this principle in practice.

title: A community committee's decision-making process (attached) shows all major decisions
question_text: A community committee's decision-making process (attached) shows all major decisions made solely by the committee president. Using ChatGPT, analyse whether this reflects the democratic functioning principle.

title: Using ChatGPT, generate an explanation of the Locality Development model
question_text: Using ChatGPT, generate an explanation of the Locality Development model of community organization, and analyse its core assumptions about community consensus and self-help.

title: A community profile (attached) shows a cohesive village with strong
question_text: A community profile (attached) shows a cohesive village with strong internal trust but limited technical resources. Using ChatGPT, analyse why the Locality Development model would be well-suited for this community.

title: Using ChatGPT, generate an explanation of the Social Planning model
question_text: Using ChatGPT, generate an explanation of the Social Planning model of community organization, and analyse how its emphasis on technical, expert-driven processes differs from the Locality Development model.

title: A city planning department's project brief (attached) is provided. Using
question_text: A city planning department's project brief (attached) is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse whether this project reflects a Social Planning model approach, identifying specific features that indicate this.

title: Using ChatGPT, generate an explanation of the Social Action model
question_text: Using ChatGPT, generate an explanation of the Social Action model of community organization, and analyse how it differs fundamentally from both Locality Development and Social Planning in its view of power and conflict.

title: A labour rights campaign case (attached) is provided. Using ChatGPT
question_text: A labour rights campaign case (attached) is provided. Using ChatGPT, analyse whether this case reflects the Social Action model, identifying specific power-conflict elements present.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse a scenario where a community faces both
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse a scenario where a community faces both a lack of internal consensus (Locality Development challenge) and a need for technical expertise (Social Planning need) — examine how a practitioner might blend both models.

title: A mixed-context case file (attached) describes a community needing both
question_text: A mixed-context case file (attached) describes a community needing both consensus-building and technical water-infrastructure planning. Using ChatGPT, analyse how elements of both Locality Development and Social Planning models could be combined here.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the criticism that the Locality Development model
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the criticism that the Locality Development model can obscure real power imbalances within a community by emphasizing consensus over conflict.

title: A community consensus-building session summary (attached) shows a marginalized group's
question_text: A community consensus-building session summary (attached) shows a marginalized group's concerns being smoothed over in favour of group harmony. Using ChatGPT, analyse this incident as a critique of the Locality Development model in practice.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the risk that the Social Planning model
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the risk that the Social Planning model can become overly top-down and expert-driven, potentially sidelining genuine community voice.

title: A social planning report (attached) shows extensive technical data but
question_text: A social planning report (attached) shows extensive technical data but no record of community consultation. Using ChatGPT, analyse this gap as a critique of Social Planning model implementation in this case.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse the risk that the Social Action model's
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse the risk that the Social Action model's confrontational approach can sometimes alienate potential allies or provoke disproportionate backlash against a community.

title: A social action campaign outcome report (attached) shows a protest
question_text: A social action campaign outcome report (attached) shows a protest that achieved media attention but resulted in strained relations with a previously supportive local official. Using ChatGPT, analyse the trade-offs illustrated by this outcome.

title: Using ChatGPT, analyse all 3 models (Locality Development, Social Planning
question_text: Using ChatGPT, analyse all 3 models (Locality Development, Social Planning, Social Action) together and examine which model — or combination of models — is most relevant to addressing community challenges in contemporary urban India.
